name: gh-agent-task
description: Use gh agent-task commands to create, run, and monitor agent tasks.

help me with gh agent task
我需要處理 gh agent task 相關工作

examples.intent: Use the gh agent task skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
